message:
Running command: # Check wrapper.v for JTAG vs SWD ports and amuxbus
grep -n "tck\|tms\|tdi\|trst_n\|swclk\|swdi\|swdo" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -20
echo "---amuxbus lines---"
grep -n "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---u_core instantiation (first 30 lines)---"
grep -n "u_core\b" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5
